name: San Diego — Freeway Loop
author: k10-san-diego
_about: The I-5/CA-52/CA-163/I-8 freeway loop, routed as ONE clean carriageway (not the messy full network), built the k10 way. Intended as a LAYOUT of the Lake Murray track.

source._doc: The loop is stitched from the named roads below along the real OSM drivable network (route.stitch='network'), then sampled for real elevation. data/network.cache.json is a cached OSM fetch so re-derivation never depends on a live Overpass call.

terrain._doc: Lessons carried over from the prior build. Roads and kerbs stay TIGHT to their real sampled elevation. The grass terrain is clamped so the raw DEM's Cowles-area peaks can't tower over a neighborhood loop where there are none.
